_description: Rules for identifying decision makers and influencers. Updated by sales leadership as targeting strategy evolves.

titles: Senior Director of Training (only if they run the function end-to-end)
decision_maker.test: Does this person OWN the function and have authority to sign a vendor agreement?

not_decision_makers: Directors and Managers of Training (unless running whole function)
exclude.not_influencers: Managers, Specialists, Coordinators, IDs, anyone below Director level
exclude.exclude_entirely: L&D roles — Learning & Development owns internal employee training, not external technical lab content

special_signals.alumni: If contact previously worked at a known Skillable customer in training/education/enablement, flag as highest-priority warm outreach

fallback: If no qualifying person found, use 'Unknown - search for [title]' — do NOT name a lower-level person to fill the slot
